summary: Surface `csv.Reader.Read()` parse errors from `readSitesCSV` instead of treating them as EOF.
reason: Greptile review on the publish PR (P1) flagged that the original loop broke on any non-nil error, silently truncating the site list on a malformed CSV row. The new loop matches on `io.EOF` and returns wrapped errors for everything else, so `sites rank` and `weather similar` surface the failure instead of returning partial results.
